title: Fast Plugin Configurer
description: A ultimate plugin that provides various tools to help server owners customize their plugins faster.
body:
FastPluginConfigurer is a ultimate plugin that provides various tools to help server owners customize their plugins faster.

## Features

- Converts chest inventory to plugin config with all items. (See below for see all available converters)
- Fully customizable.
- Provides gui menus for plugin configs, you can quickly change the config values.

## Converters

- [DeluxeMenus](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/deluxemenus.11734/)
- [BetterGUI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/bettergui.75620/)
- [ZMenu](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/zmenu-ultra-complete-menu-plugin.110402/)
- [ChestCommands](https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/chest-commands)

## Commands

- /fpc config <plugin-name> [config-name] - open the inventory with all the values from the config. SUPPORTS ANY PLUGIN
- /fpc filetoinventory <converter> <file-name> - converts all items from file and store to the chest you are looking at.
- /fpc inventorytofile <converter> <file-name> - converts all items from the chest you are looking at into a file.


![plugin`s bStats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/FastPluginConfigurer.svg)
